hero.tagline: The Best Car in the World. Redefined.

overview.minides: The definitive luxury sedan benchmark — now with India's first PHEV S-Class — featuring 115 km EV range, the MBUX Superscreen, and 15 airbags.
overview.description: The facelifted 2026 Mercedes-Benz S-Class (W223) reaches India in two lines: the S 450e PHEV (Launch Edition Exclusive Line and MANUFAKTUR AMG Line) and the hand-finished Mercedes-Maybach S-Class (S 580 and S 680). The AMG S 63 E Performance completes the lineup. For the first time, the mainstream S-Class in India gets a plug-in hybrid drivetrain — the S 450e — combining a 3.0L inline-six with a 22 kWh battery and 120 kW rear motor for 449 hp combined, 115 km EV range, and 32.3 kmpl ARAI. The W223 facelift brings a 20% larger illuminated grille, tri-star LED headlight signatures up to 600m projection, an illuminated bonnet star, a new MBUX Superscreen (14.4-inch + 12.3-inch passenger display), and MB.OS software architecture.

suspension.front: Double wishbone air suspension (AIRMATIC with ADS+)
suspension.additionalTech: E-Active Body Control (Magic Body Control) — optional; standard on Maybach

steering.column: Electrically adjustable; Rear-axle steering (up to 10° on Maybach)

m256-3-0L-phev-449hp.name: M256 3.0L Inline-6 Turbo + ISG + 120 kW e-Motor (S 450e PHEV)

m177-4-0L-v8-amg-s63-791hp.name: AMG M177 4.0L V8 Biturbo + 150 kW E-Motor (AMG S 63 E Performance)
m177-4-0L-v8-amg-s63-791hp.electricMotor: 150 kW / 204 hp Rear-Axle AMG Electric Motor

variants.name: S 450e Launch Edition (Exclusive Line)
keyFeatures: 3.0L M256 Inline-6 Turbo + 120 kW Electric Motor (449 hp combined)
22 kWh PHEV Battery — 115 km Pure EV Range (WLTP)
60 kW DC Fast Charge — 10–80% in 20 Minutes
India's First PHEV S-Class
14.4-inch MBUX Superscreen + 12.3-inch Cluster
Burmester 4D Surround Sound (31 Speakers)
15 Airbags | MBUX Intelligent Drive Plus (Level 2 ADAS)

variants.name: S 450e MANUFAKTUR Edition (AMG Line)
keyFeatures: AMG Line Exterior Package (Gloss Black Grille, Diffuser, Sill Blades)
MANUFAKTUR Paint — Exclusive Body Colour Options
12.3-inch Front Passenger Display (MBUX Superscreen Full)
Nappa Leather AMG Line Interior
20-inch AMG Multi-Spoke Alloy Wheels
Rear Entertainment Screens (11.6 inch × 2)
115 km Pure EV Range + One-Pedal Drive Mode

variants.name: Mercedes-Maybach S 580 4MATIC
keyFeatures: 4.0L M177 V8 Biturbo (503 hp) + 48V EQ Boost Mild Hybrid
4MATIC Intelligent AWD
Extended Wheelbase (+180 mm) — Extraordinary Rear Legroom
Executive Rear Seat Package — Heated / Ventilated / Massage + 8-Way Adjustment
Rear-Axle Steering (up to 4.5°)
E-Active Body Control (Magic Body Control) — Road Surface Scan
Burmester 4D High-End Surround Sound (30 Speakers)

variants.name: Mercedes-Maybach S 680 4MATIC
keyFeatures: 6.0L M279 V12 Biturbo — Only V12 Available in India
612 hp / 900 Nm — Most Powerful S-Class in India
Extended Maybach Wheelbase — Presidential Rear Suite
Night Series Package Available (Gloss Black Accents)
Champagne Flutes, Rear Console with Refrigerator (optional)
Maybach Exclusive Two-Tone Exterior Paintwork
Burmester 4D Surround Sound | E-Active Body Control (Standard)

variants.name: Mercedes-AMG S 63 E Performance
keyFeatures: 791 hp V8 Biturbo + AMG 150 kW Electric Motor — S-Class's Fastest Ever
1430 Nm via AMG Torque Control (Rear Axle Torque Vectoring)
0–100 km/h in 3.3 Seconds — Top Speed 290 km/h
AMG E Performance PHEV — 33 km EV Range | 60 kW DC Charge
AMG Active Rear Axle Steering + AMG Ride Control+ Air Suspension
AMG Carbon Fibre Interior with Flat-Bottom Performance Steering Wheel
AMG Track Pace + AMG Dynamic Select Drive Modes (Race, Sport+, Slippery)
